intent: Auto-expand companion PDF groups on first load in LessonsTab sidebar (R1/R2), show material count badges on video rows (U1/U2), and clean up the unused lessonTitle parameter from showCelebration. Standalone PDFs must continue rendering as primary rows with no regression (R4).

findings.title: lessonTitle field still required in CompletionFlowParams but unused by hook
findings.suggested_fix: Remove lessonTitle: string from line 22 of CompletionFlowParams interface and remove lessonTitle: state.lessonTitle, from line 192 of UnifiedLessonPlayer.tsx.

findings.title: Mock return type too narrow for test overrides causing tsc errors
findings.suggested_fix: Explicitly type prevLesson, nextLesson, lessons, and loading fields in the mock function return with broader types (T | null for nullable fields) to allow test overrides.

applied_fixes: Removed lessonTitle: string from CompletionFlowParams interface (useCompletionFlow.ts:22)
Removed lessonTitle: state.lessonTitle, from UnifiedLessonPlayer.tsx caller (line 192)
Broadened mockUseLessonNavigation return types to allow nullable overrides in tests (UnifiedLessonPlayer.test.tsx:78)
residual_risks: If the adapter fires getGroupedLessons() rapidly (e.g. on remount), the ignore pattern handles stale materialGroups, but the auto-expand effect could fire for intermediate isLoading states if they briefly flip. In practice, React 18 batching makes this unlikely.
testing_gaps: No test for the merge behavior when new groups appear on subsequent loads (else branch at lines 656-670 of LessonsTab.tsx)
No test verifying initialExpandDoneRef resets when courseId changes
